relationships: ber:Yanni yedder acḥal n yiseggasen deg Dzayer Tamaneɣt
ber:Tṛuḥ acḥal n tikkal ɣer Hawaii
ber:Rezfeɣ yakan acḥal n tikkal ɣer Ustṛalya

ber:Azal n umahil-inu meqqer acḥal n tikkal ugar waya
ber:Dan yurem ad as-iɣer i Linda acḥal n tikkal
ber:Tom yerzef acḥal n tikkal ɣer Ustṛalya
